name: RPlog_Crew_of_the_Black_Dragon
title: Crew of the Black Dragon
summary: In the crew quarters of the Black Dragon, the medic Amylynn tends to Luke Skywalker's severed hand while a recovering Jessalyn Valios rests nearby after their harrowing escape from the Sith Lord Sabbath. Paul Nighman, the street kid Shenner, and others gather to comfort Jessalyn, and the mood lightens into music, banter, a pillow fight, and Paul's heartfelt singing of a song he wrote. Beneath the levity runs Jessalyn's anguish over her unrequited feelings for Luke, which Paul gently but persistently presses her to confront. When Luke wakes and offers everyone a place with the Republic, plans turn toward Coruscant and a mission to find Grathix on Mandalore. The evening sours as Paul's prodding drives Jessalyn to a tearful outburst and Shenner flees upset; afterward Lando arrives to console Jessalyn, counseling patience regarding Luke before bidding her rest as the ship nears Coruscant.
